The father, Andrew Pigors, has raised concerns about improper modifications to the parenting time arrangement without a hearing. MCL 722.23(a-l) outlines the best interest factors that a court must consider when making custody and parenting time determinations. The evidence suggests that these factors have not been adequately addressed in the August ex parte order, which did not simply adjust one element of the parenting time schedule but appears to have significantly altered the arrangement (se
